trigger: 30-minute MVP builder run: implement MVP-009 / SC-001 framework seed loader foundations.
scope: Add a minimal schema extension plus a deterministic seed generator for data/capstone-framework.json, with contract tests for counts/required fields.
changes: Added migration 0002 framework seed support tables (sections, checks, credit owners, review gates, evidence signals).
Added scripts/framework-seed.mjs to generate idempotent seed SQL for requirements/deadlines/checks from data/capstone-framework.json.
Added tests/framework-seed.test.mjs to lock mapping counts and prevent leaking local filesystem paths into seed SQL output.
Updated the master plan with a stable Functionality UX Upgrade Model heading so the automation parser has a durable anchor.
known_limits: Seed SQL generation is repo-local; applying the SQL to local/remote D1 still requires Wrangler access and a follow-on verification query pass.
next_actions: Generate seed SQL: powershell -NoProfile -NonInteractive -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File .\scripts\run-node-script.ps1 scripts\framework-seed.mjs --format sql --out .secrets\framework-seed.sql
Apply to D1 (local/remote) with Wrangler and verify row counts for requirements, deadlines, and quality_checks.
Wire student/staff endpoints and dashboards to use seeded requirements instead of the alpha-only placeholder requirement.
